decision-tree.root-question: Does the call require strict-schema JSON compliance (every field present and typed)?

branch.conclusion: Switch to `client.beta.chat.completions.parse` with a Pydantic model — see [[openai-function-calling]]. JSON Mode does not enforce field presence.

branch.question: Is the task an inner-loop extraction/classification (latency-sensitive, cost-sensitive)?

branch.conclusion: Use o3-mini or o1 for chain-of-thought; skip temperature param (o-series ignores it).
Use gpt-4o with a small CoT prefix — o-series is too slow for sub-5s targets.
Use gpt-4o, temperature 0.7–1.0, no `response_format`. Set `seed` only if you need reproducibility.

example.p: 50 product descriptions to extract title+price → schema_strict=false, task_class=inner-loop, parallel_fanout=50 → async + mini + semaphore(10). Conclusion r4-async-throttle.
